title: Prismatica
description: A kitchen sink modpack that supports all play styles, and most importantly, creativity.
body:
# About
> Prismatica is a Minecraft modpack that has three main goals, to support all play styles, enhance creativity, and give all players a challenge. Prismatica includes a multitude of mods that work together in a very well and cohesive way, with numerous mod integrations!

## Why this pack?
> Prismatica has a special touch to it that not your average kitchen sink pack will have. We have numerous features that you don't get with just throwing mods together, we make sure to tweak our configs and add support between mods in such a way that works unlike any other. Our pack is also extremally performant, so most devices can play it!

### This pack is in beta!
> This pack is highly experimental at the moment, so we recommend making backups of your worlds when playing, as many game breaking changes may occur.
